body:
# Bug report

## Current behavior

Clicking on Label does nothing.

## Expected behavior

Clicking on Label should open Select dropdown.

## Reproducible example

https://codesandbox.io/p/sandbox/boring-pine-w4vm7l?file=%2Fsrc%2FApp.tsx%3A8%2C42

## Base UI version

latest

## Which browser are you using?

Firefox and Chrome.

## Which OS are you using?

Mac OS

## Which assistive tech are you using (if applicable)?

n/a

## Additional context

Codesandbox is built using examples from BaseUI docs.
title: [Field] Clicking on `Label` does not open / focus `Select`
